title: Use eval-driven development to discover the real Consumer Radar enhancement workflow required by ...

goal.value: Use eval-driven development to discover the real Consumer Radar enhancement workflow required by product feedback

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

prompt.String:
# Enhancement Eval Consensus

You are an eval judge for the enhancement-discovery workflow.

Read all available artifacts under `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/`, especially candidate files and contract eval JSON files.

Use this rubric:

- Intent fidelity: does the artifact solve the user's actual request?
- Non-cheating behavior: does it reject fixture-only, note-only, or placeholder implementations when real behavior is required?
- Test-driven development: are objective behaviors covered by deterministic tests and gates?
- Eval-driven development: are subjective outputs scored by rubric, pairwise comparison, and consensus?
- Architecture quality: are boundaries clear and maintainable?
- Workflow quality: are retry paths, fanout, gates, artifacts, and handoffs explicit?
- Simplification: does it require a real code simplification pass without deleting acceptance coverage?

Write the appropriate selected artifact:

- For spec consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-spec.md`.
- For architecture consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-architecture.md`.
- For workflow consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-workflow-design.md`.
- For final consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/final-eval-consensus.md`.

End with one of:

- `VERDICT: APPROVED`
- `VERDICT: REJECTED`

If rejected, include exact changes required before retry.

# Enhancement Spec Candidate A: Data Truth

You are writing one candidate spec for an app enhancement request. Optimize for data honesty and non-cheating acceptance criteria.

Read:

- Request analysis: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/request-analysis.json`
- Capability audit: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/capability-audit.json`
- Existing app directory: `apps/generated-consumer-app-radar`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates/data-truth.md`.

Required rubric coverage:

- User intent in plain language
- Existing capability vs missing capability
- Non-cheating criteria that fail fixture-only or note-only implementations
- Data source requirements and credential assumptions
- Test-driven acceptance gates
- Eval-driven acceptance gates
- Pairwise comparison notes against alternate specs
- Definition of done
- Explicit simplification requirement

The spec must require concrete product behavior, not just disclosure text.

# Workflow Candidate A: Direct Enhancement

Design a Fabro workflow that directly enhances the target app from the selected spec and architecture.

Read:

- `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates/`
- `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates/`
- Existing app workflow files under `workflows/`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/workflow-candidates/direct-enhancement.md`.

Required rubric coverage:

- DOT graph stages
- Test-driven deterministic gates
- Eval-driven rubric gates
- Candidate fanout for spec/plan/review stages
- Non-cheating live behavior gates
- Code simplification stage before final review
- Pairwise comparison against a generated-subworkflow design
- CI/CD and handoff artifacts

The workflow must fail when a request requires real behavior but the implementation only adds explanatory copy.

# Enhancement Eval Consensus

You are an eval judge for the enhancement-discovery workflow.

Read all available artifacts under `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/`, especially candidate files and contract eval JSON files.

Use this rubric:

- Intent fidelity: does the artifact solve the user's actual request?
- Non-cheating behavior: does it reject fixture-only, note-only, or placeholder implementations when real behavior is required?
- Test-driven development: are objective behaviors covered by deterministic tests and gates?
- Eval-driven development: are subjective outputs scored by rubric, pairwise comparison, and consensus?
- Architecture quality: are boundaries clear and maintainable?
- Workflow quality: are retry paths, fanout, gates, artifacts, and handoffs explicit?
- Simplification: does it require a real code simplification pass without deleting acceptance coverage?

Write the appropriate selected artifact:

- For spec consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-spec.md`.
- For architecture consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-architecture.md`.
- For workflow consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-workflow-design.md`.
- For final consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/final-eval-consensus.md`.

End with one of:

- `VERDICT: APPROVED`
- `VERDICT: REJECTED`

If rejected, include exact changes required before retry.

script.String: node scripts/app-feedback/evaluate-enhancement-artifact.mjs --stage spec --candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/spec-contract.json --minimum-candidates '3' --minimum-eval-score '0.78' --dataset evals/workflow-quality/datasets/enhancement-discovery-golden.jsonl --dataset-version workflow-quality-v1 --prompt-version app-feedback-spec-candidates-v1 --rubric-version enhancement-discovery-spec-rubric-v1 --judge-model deterministic-marker-v1 --baseline evals/workflow-quality/baselines/enhancement-discovery-spec.json --max-regression '0.05'

script.String: if [ 'false' = 'true' ]; then fabro run 'workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.toml' --no-upgrade-check; else node scripts/app-feedback/fabro-validate-compat.mjs 'workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.fabro' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/generated-fabro-validate.json; fi

prompt.String:
# Enhancement Spec Candidate C: Workflow First

You are writing one candidate spec for an app enhancement request. Optimize for the Fabro workflow needed to build the enhancement reliably.

Read:

- Request analysis: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/request-analysis.json`
- Capability audit: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/capability-audit.json`
- Existing workflow patterns in `workflows/`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates/workflow-first.md`.

Required rubric coverage:

- Workflow stages from request to release handoff
- Candidate fanout and pairwise evaluation for subjective stages
- Deterministic contract tests for objective behavior
- Promptfoo/OpenRouter rubric evals for subjective quality
- Architecture, implementation, simplification, review, and CI/CD gates
- Non-cheating gates that fail if the implementation only adds notes
- Evidence artifacts that every stage must publish

The spec should make Fabro own the enhancement process, not a one-off human patch.

# Workflow Candidate B: Generated Subworkflow

Design a Fabro workflow that first generates an app-specific enhancement workflow, then validates or runs it.

Read:

- `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates/`
- `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates/`
- Existing app workflow files under `workflows/`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/workflow-candidates/generated-subworkflow.md`.

Required rubric coverage:

- Parent workflow stages
- Generated child workflow stages
- Test-driven deterministic gates
- Eval-driven rubric gates and pairwise comparison
- Non-cheating live data gates
- Code simplification stages in both parent and child workflows
- Retry targets and handoff artifacts
- CI/CD and model-review fanout

The workflow should be reusable for future apps, not only Consumer Radar.

script.String: mkdir -p .workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/workflow-candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals; test -f 'feedback/consumer-radar-product-feedback.md'; test -d 'apps/generated-consumer-app-radar'; echo eval_driven_development test_driven_development

node scripts/app-feedback/evaluate-enhancement-artifact.mjs --stage workflow --candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/workflow-candidates --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/workflow-contract.json --minimum-candidates '2' --minimum-eval-score '0.78' --dataset evals/workflow-quality/datasets/enhancement-discovery-golden.jsonl --dataset-version workflow-quality-v1 --prompt-version app-feedback-workflow-candidates-v1 --rubric-version enhancement-discovery-workflow-rubric-v1 --judge-model deterministic-marker-v1 --baseline evals/workflow-quality/baselines/enhancement-discovery-workflow.json --max-regression '0.05'

prompt.String:
# Architecture Candidate A: Smallest Surface

Design the smallest architecture that satisfies the selected enhancement spec without hiding missing behavior.

Read:

- Spec candidates in `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates/`
- Spec eval report in `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/spec-contract.json`
- Capability audit in `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/capability-audit.json`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates/smallest-surface.md`.

Required rubric coverage:

- Files and modules to change
- Interfaces and data flow
- Test-driven development gates
- Eval-driven development gates
- Non-cheating source/data checks
- Failure modes and retry paths
- Pairwise comparison against a more extensible architecture
- Simplification pass criteria

Prefer minimal surface area, but do not remove acceptance coverage.

# Architecture Candidate B: Extensible Source Pipeline

Design an extensible architecture for the selected enhancement spec, with reusable source adapters and workflow gates.

Read:

- Spec candidates in `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates/`
- Spec eval report in `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/spec-contract.json`
- Capability audit in `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/capability-audit.json`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates/extensible-source-pipeline.md`.

Required rubric coverage:

- Files and modules to create
- Source adapter boundaries
- API and persistence boundaries
- Observability and evidence artifacts
- Test-driven development gates
- Eval-driven development gates
- Pairwise tradeoffs against the smallest-surface architecture
- Simplification pass criteria

Prefer reuse across future app-enhancement workflows.

label.String: Architecture Candidate B - Extensible Source Pipeline

prompt.String:
# Enhancement Simplification Plan

You are the simplification reviewer for the enhancement-discovery workflow.

Read:

- Generated enhancement workflow: `workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.fabro`
- Selected spec: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-spec.md`
- Selected architecture: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-architecture.md`
- Validation report: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/generated-workflow-validation.json`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/simplification-plan.md`.

Required sections:

- Behavior that must remain unchanged
- Redundant stages, prompts, scripts, or data paths to remove
- Acceptance gates that must not be weakened
- Test-driven checks to rerun after simplification
- Eval-driven checks to rerun after simplification
- Pairwise comparison of pre-simplification vs post-simplification workflow quality
- Final recommendation

End with `VERDICT: APPROVED` only if simplification improves clarity without reducing behavior or evidence.

# Enhancement Eval Consensus

You are an eval judge for the enhancement-discovery workflow.

Read all available artifacts under `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/`, especially candidate files and contract eval JSON files.

Use this rubric:

- Intent fidelity: does the artifact solve the user's actual request?
- Non-cheating behavior: does it reject fixture-only, note-only, or placeholder implementations when real behavior is required?
- Test-driven development: are objective behaviors covered by deterministic tests and gates?
- Eval-driven development: are subjective outputs scored by rubric, pairwise comparison, and consensus?
- Architecture quality: are boundaries clear and maintainable?
- Workflow quality: are retry paths, fanout, gates, artifacts, and handoffs explicit?
- Simplification: does it require a real code simplification pass without deleting acceptance coverage?

Write the appropriate selected artifact:

- For spec consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-spec.md`.
- For architecture consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-architecture.md`.
- For workflow consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/selected-workflow-design.md`.
- For final consensus, write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/final-eval-consensus.md`.

End with one of:

- `VERDICT: APPROVED`
- `VERDICT: REJECTED`

If rejected, include exact changes required before retry.

- Non-cheating behavior: does it reject fixture-only, note-only, or placeholder implementations when real behavior is required?
- Test-driven development: are objective behaviors covered by deterministic tests and gates?
- Eval-driven development: are subjective outputs scored by rubric, pairwise comparison, and consensus?

# Enhancement Spec Candidate B: UX Outcome

You are writing one candidate spec for an app enhancement request. Optimize for the user-facing outcome and product workflow.

Read:

- Request analysis: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/request-analysis.json`
- Capability audit: `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/capability-audit.json`
- Existing app directory: `apps/generated-consumer-app-radar`

Write `.workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates/ux-outcome.md`.

Required rubric coverage:

- User workflows before and after the enhancement
- Visible product surfaces and API endpoints
- Acceptance gates for actual behavior
- Non-cheating checks for placeholder UI, fake data, and fixture-only paths
- Test-driven development plan
- Eval-driven development plan
- Pairwise tradeoffs against data-first and workflow-first specs
- Simplification stage criteria

Prefer narrow, shippable behavior that proves the enhancement works end to end.

inputs.String: app_dir, feedback_path, target_adapter, generated_workflow, generated_run_config, real_mode, allow_fixture_fallback, execute_generated_workflow, minimum_spec_candidates, minimum_architecture_candidates, minimum_workflow_candidates, minimum_eval_score, max_eval_regression, minimum_active_reviews, require_simplification

outputs.String: capability_audit, selected_spec, selected_architecture, generated_enhancement_workflow, eval_reports, simplification_plan, final_handoff

goal.String: Use eval-driven development to discover the real Consumer Radar enhancement workflow required by product feedback

spec.graph_source:
digraph EnhancementDiscovery {
    graph [
        goal="Turn app enhancement requests into an evaluated spec, architecture, generated enhancement workflow, simplification pass, and release handoff",
        persona="eval-driven-workflow-builder",
        inputs="app_dir, feedback_path, target_adapter, generated_workflow, generated_run_config, real_mode, allow_fixture_fallback, execute_generated_workflow, minimum_spec_candidates, minimum_architecture_candidates, minimum_workflow_candidates, minimum_eval_score, max_eval_regression, minimum_active_reviews, require_simplification",
        outputs="capability_audit, selected_spec, selected_architecture, generated_enhancement_workflow, eval_reports, simplification_plan, final_handoff",
        default_max_retries=2,
        retry_target="spec_fanout",
        fallback_retry_target="workflow_fanout",
        model_stylesheet="
            *             { provider: openrouter; model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .spec          { provider: openrouter; model: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .architecture  { provider: openrouter; model: qwen/qwen3.6-plus; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .workflow      { provider: openrouter; model: moonshotai/kimi-k2.6; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .eval          { provider: openrouter; model: deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .cheap         { provider: openrouter; model: deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash; reasoning_effort: low; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    bootstrap [
        label="Bootstrap Enhancement Discovery",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="bootstrap",
        script="mkdir -p .workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/workflow-candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals; test -f '{{ inputs.feedback_path|default('feedback/consumer-radar-product-feedback.md') }}'; test -d '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-consumer-app-radar') }}'; echo eval_driven_development test_driven_development"
    ]

    parse_requests [
        label="Parse Enhancement Requests",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="bootstrap",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/parse-feedback.mjs --feedback '{{ inputs.feedback_path|default('feedback/consumer-radar-product-feedback.md') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/request-analysis.json"
    ]

    capability_audit [
        label="Capability Audit",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="parse_requests",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/analyze-enhancement-capabilities.mjs --app-dir '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-consumer-app-radar') }}' --analysis .workflow/enhancement-discovery/request-analysis.json --target '{{ inputs.target_adapter|default('consumer-radar') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/capability-audit.json"
    ]

    spec_fanout [shape=component, label="Spec Candidate Fanout"]
    spec_candidate_a [
        label="Spec Candidate A - Data Truth",
        class="spec",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/spec-candidate-a.md"
    ]
    spec_candidate_b [
        label="Spec Candidate B - UX Outcome",
        class="spec",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/spec-candidate-b.md"
    ]
    spec_candidate_c [
        label="Spec Candidate C - Workflow First",
        class="spec",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/spec-candidate-c.md"
    ]
    spec_join [shape=tripleoctagon, label="Spec Candidate Join", join_policy="wait_all"]

    ensure_spec_candidates [
        label="Ensure Spec Candidate Count",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_fanout",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/ensure-enhancement-candidates.mjs --stage spec --dir .workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates --minimum '{{ inputs.minimum_spec_candidates|default('3') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/spec-candidate-ensure.json"
    ]
    spec_eval_contract [
        label="Spec Contract Eval",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_fanout",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/evaluate-enhancement-artifact.mjs --stage spec --candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/spec-candidates --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/spec-contract.json --minimum-candidates '{{ inputs.minimum_spec_candidates|default('3') }}' --minimum-eval-score '{{ inputs.minimum_eval_score|default('0.78') }}' --dataset evals/workflow-quality/datasets/enhancement-discovery-golden.jsonl --dataset-version workflow-quality-v1 --prompt-version app-feedback-spec-candidates-v1 --rubric-version enhancement-discovery-spec-rubric-v1 --judge-model deterministic-marker-v1 --baseline evals/workflow-quality/baselines/enhancement-discovery-spec.json --max-regression '{{ inputs.max_eval_regression|default('0.05') }}'"
    ]
    spec_eval_model [
        label="Spec Rubric Eval",
        class="eval",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/eval-consensus.md"
    ]
    spec_eval_consensus [
        label="Spec Eval Consensus",
        class="eval",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="spec_fanout",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/eval-consensus.md"
    ]

    architecture_fanout [shape=component, label="Architecture Candidate Fanout"]
    architecture_candidate_a [
        label="Architecture Candidate A - Smallest Surface",
        class="architecture",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/architecture-candidate-a.md"
    ]
    architecture_candidate_b [
        label="Architecture Candidate B - Extensible Source Pipeline",
        class="architecture",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/architecture-candidate-b.md"
    ]
    architecture_join [shape=tripleoctagon, label="Architecture Candidate Join", join_policy="wait_all"]
    ensure_architecture_candidates [
        label="Ensure Architecture Candidate Count",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="architecture_fanout",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/ensure-enhancement-candidates.mjs --stage architecture --dir .workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates --minimum '{{ inputs.minimum_architecture_candidates|default('2') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/architecture-candidate-ensure.json"
    ]
    architecture_eval_contract [
        label="Architecture Contract Eval",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="architecture_fanout",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/evaluate-enhancement-artifact.mjs --stage architecture --candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/architecture-candidates --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/architecture-contract.json --minimum-candidates '{{ inputs.minimum_architecture_candidates|default('2') }}' --minimum-eval-score '{{ inputs.minimum_eval_score|default('0.78') }}' --dataset evals/workflow-quality/datasets/enhancement-discovery-golden.jsonl --dataset-version workflow-quality-v1 --prompt-version app-feedback-architecture-candidates-v1 --rubric-version enhancement-discovery-architecture-rubric-v1 --judge-model deterministic-marker-v1 --baseline evals/workflow-quality/baselines/enhancement-discovery-architecture.json --max-regression '{{ inputs.max_eval_regression|default('0.05') }}'"
    ]
    architecture_eval_consensus [
        label="Architecture Eval Consensus",
        class="eval",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="architecture_fanout",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/eval-consensus.md"
    ]

    workflow_fanout [shape=component, label="Workflow Candidate Fanout"]
    workflow_candidate_a [
        label="Workflow Candidate A - Direct Enhancement",
        class="workflow",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/workflow-candidate-a.md"
    ]
    workflow_candidate_b [
        label="Workflow Candidate B - Generated Subworkflow",
        class="workflow",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/workflow-candidate-b.md"
    ]
    workflow_join [shape=tripleoctagon, label="Workflow Candidate Join", join_policy="wait_all"]
    ensure_workflow_candidates [
        label="Ensure Workflow Candidate Count",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="workflow_fanout",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/ensure-enhancement-candidates.mjs --stage workflow --dir .workflow/enhancement-discovery/workflow-candidates --minimum '{{ inputs.minimum_workflow_candidates|default('2') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/workflow-candidate-ensure.json"
    ]
    workflow_eval_contract [
        label="Workflow Contract Eval",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="workflow_fanout",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/evaluate-enhancement-artifact.mjs --stage workflow --candidates .workflow/enhancement-discovery/workflow-candidates --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/workflow-contract.json --minimum-candidates '{{ inputs.minimum_workflow_candidates|default('2') }}' --minimum-eval-score '{{ inputs.minimum_eval_score|default('0.78') }}' --dataset evals/workflow-quality/datasets/enhancement-discovery-golden.jsonl --dataset-version workflow-quality-v1 --prompt-version app-feedback-workflow-candidates-v1 --rubric-version enhancement-discovery-workflow-rubric-v1 --judge-model deterministic-marker-v1 --baseline evals/workflow-quality/baselines/enhancement-discovery-workflow.json --max-regression '{{ inputs.max_eval_regression|default('0.05') }}'"
    ]
    workflow_eval_consensus [
        label="Workflow Eval Consensus",
        class="eval",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="workflow_fanout",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/eval-consensus.md"
    ]

    materialize_enhancement_workflow [
        label="Materialize Enhancement Workflow",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="workflow_fanout",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/materialize-enhancement-workflow.mjs --target '{{ inputs.target_adapter|default('consumer-radar') }}' --app-dir '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-consumer-app-radar') }}' --workflow '{{ inputs.generated_workflow|default('workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.fabro') }}' --run-config '{{ inputs.generated_run_config|default('workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.toml') }}' --real-mode '{{ inputs.real_mode|default('true') }}' --allow-fixture-fallback '{{ inputs.allow_fixture_fallback|default('false') }}'"
    ]

    validate_enhancement_workflow [
        label="Validate Generated Enhancement Workflow",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_enhancement_workflow",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/validate-enhancement-discovery.mjs --workflow workflows/app-feedback/discover-enhancement.fabro --generated-workflow '{{ inputs.generated_workflow|default('workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.fabro') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/generated-workflow-validation.json"
    ]

    run_generated_enhancement_workflow [
        label="Run Generated Enhancement Workflow",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_enhancement_workflow",
        script="if [ '{{ inputs.execute_generated_workflow|default('false') }}' = 'true' ]; then fabro run '{{ inputs.generated_run_config|default('workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.toml') }}' --no-upgrade-check; else node scripts/app-feedback/fabro-validate-compat.mjs '{{ inputs.generated_workflow|default('workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.fabro') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/generated-fabro-validate.json; fi"
    ]

    simplification_plan [
        label="Simplification Plan",
        class="eval",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_enhancement_workflow",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/simplification-plan.md"
    ]

    final_eval_fanout [shape=component, label="Final Eval Fanout"]
    final_eval_workflow_quality [
        label="Final Workflow Quality Eval",
        class="eval",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/eval-consensus.md"
    ]
    final_eval_simplification [
        label="Final Simplification Eval",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="simplification_plan",
        script="test '{{ inputs.require_simplification|default('true') }}' != 'true' || test -s .workflow/enhancement-discovery/simplification-plan.md"
    ]
    final_eval_join [shape=tripleoctagon, label="Final Eval Join", join_policy="wait_all"]
    final_eval_consensus [
        label="Final Eval Consensus",
        class="eval",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="simplification_plan",
        prompt="@../../prompts/app-feedback/eval-consensus.md"
    ]

    promptfoo_workflow_quality [
        label="Promptfoo Workflow Quality Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="simplification_plan",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/promptfoo-workflow-quality.mjs --config evals/workflow-quality/enhancement-discovery.yaml --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/evals/promptfoo-workflow-quality.json --allow-fallback true"
    ]

    publish_handoff [
        label="Publish Enhancement Discovery Handoff",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="final_eval_consensus",
        script="node scripts/app-feedback/publish-enhancement-discovery-handoff.mjs --app-dir '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('apps/generated-consumer-app-radar') }}' --generated-workflow '{{ inputs.generated_workflow|default('workflows/consumer-radar/live-enrichment.fabro') }}' --out .workflow/enhancement-discovery/handoff.json"
    ]

    start -> bootstrap
    bootstrap -> parse_requests [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    bootstrap -> bootstrap [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    parse_requests -> capability_audit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    parse_requests -> bootstrap [label="Fix"]
    capability_audit -> spec_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    capability_audit -> parse_requests [label="Fix"]
    spec_fanout -> spec_candidate_a
    spec_fanout -> spec_candidate_b
    spec_fanout -> spec_candidate_c
    spec_candidate_a -> spec_join
    spec_candidate_b -> spec_join
    spec_candidate_c -> spec_join
    spec_join -> ensure_spec_candidates
    ensure_spec_candidates -> spec_eval_contract [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    ensure_spec_candidates -> spec_fanout [label="Re-spec"]
    spec_eval_contract -> spec_eval_model [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_eval_contract -> spec_fanout [label="Re-spec"]
    spec_eval_model -> spec_eval_consensus [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_eval_model -> spec_fanout [label="Re-spec"]
    spec_eval_consensus -> architecture_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    spec_eval_consensus -> spec_fanout [label="Re-spec"]
    architecture_fanout -> architecture_candidate_a
    architecture_fanout -> architecture_candidate_b
    architecture_candidate_a -> architecture_join
    architecture_candidate_b -> architecture_join
    architecture_join -> ensure_architecture_candidates
    ensure_architecture_candidates -> architecture_eval_contract [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    ensure_architecture_candidates -> architecture_fanout [label="Re-architect"]
    architecture_eval_contract -> architecture_eval_consensus [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    architecture_eval_contract -> architecture_fanout [label="Re-architect"]
    architecture_eval_consensus -> workflow_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    architecture_eval_consensus -> architecture_fanout [label="Re-architect"]
    workflow_fanout -> workflow_candidate_a
    workflow_fanout -> workflow_candidate_b
    workflow_candidate_a -> workflow_join
    workflow_candidate_b -> workflow_join
    workflow_join -> ensure_workflow_candidates
    ensure_workflow_candidates -> workflow_eval_contract [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    ensure_workflow_candidates -> workflow_fanout [label="Re-workflow"]
    workflow_eval_contract -> workflow_eval_consensus [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    workflow_eval_contract -> workflow_fanout [label="Re-workflow"]
    workflow_eval_consensus -> materialize_enhancement_workflow [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    workflow_eval_consensus -> workflow_fanout [label="Re-workflow"]
    materialize_enhancement_workflow -> validate_enhancement_workflow [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    materialize_enhancement_workflow -> workflow_fanout [label="Fix"]
    validate_enhancement_workflow -> run_generated_enhancement_workflow [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    validate_enhancement_workflow -> materialize_enhancement_workflow [label="Fix"]
    run_generated_enhancement_workflow -> simplification_plan [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    run_generated_enhancement_workflow -> materialize_enhancement_workflow [label="Fix"]
    simplification_plan -> final_eval_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    simplification_plan -> materialize_enhancement_workflow [label="Fix"]
    final_eval_fanout -> final_eval_workflow_quality
    final_eval_fanout -> final_eval_simplification
    final_eval_workflow_quality -> final_eval_join
    final_eval_simplification -> final_eval_join
    final_eval_join -> final_eval_consensus
    final_eval_consensus -> promptfoo_workflow_quality [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    final_eval_consensus -> simplification_plan [label="Fix"]
    promptfoo_workflow_quality -> publish_handoff [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    promptfoo_workflow_quality -> simplification_plan [label="Fix"]
    publish_handoff -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    publish_handoff -> final_eval_consensus [label="Fix"]
}
